inputs.label: Centuries
inputs.businessContext: Number of centuries to convert to millennia.

inputs.label: Years per Century
inputs.businessContext: Definition of a century in years. Normally 100.

inputs.label: Years per Millennium
inputs.businessContext: Definition of a millennium in years. Normally 1000.

inputs.label: Decimal Precision
inputs.businessContext: Number of decimal places for the result.

formulas.millennia: Math.round((inputs.centuries * inputs.centuryYears / inputs.millenniumYears) * Math.pow(10, inputs.precision)) / Math.pow(10, inputs.precision)
